attributes.action: Dissolve Parliament and declare a General Election.
attributes.additional_details: The present UK government is unable to fulfill it's purpose and deal with the complex affairs of managing and governing effectively. This elected party makes mistake after mistake in judgement and action and the deterioration within it's ranks is evident, declining further daily. Their focus has become self and job preservation and the well being of the UK is not being prioritised. This is not what they were given the opportunity to deliver. The UK has been placed in a position of jeopardy.
attributes.background: In light of the ongoing and the constant stream of revelations within the present UK Government, it is clear that this government has been forced to focus on daily drama, speculation and the preservation of individuals "jobs" This is not fulfilling the role or purpose for which they were elected for

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Dissolve Parliament and call a General Election now!
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/750050
